w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Is there any reason when typing in the address that the “number”
of the address does not show? Meaning
not giving the exact address from which the client can choose.
number – give client option to tick “same as
This should be “Service Fee” and not “monthly service fee”
Could we change this to “Frequency Repayment” instead of “Estimated repayment”

After clicking “Submit Application” and there are fields or sections missing, instead of only showing 1 information missing at a time, why not list all information missing and highlight those fields/sections in red as well?
Will “employee user” become the clients “name and surname”?
& this is based on outstanding balance, Income and expenses on the system “subject to credit check and affordability”
After clicking Apply New Loan – should lead to a question – “How much do you need paid out to you?”

with option to type in the amount. Next pop up will be 3 options nearest to payout amount needed by logic of new proposed loan amounts and terms. This will be based on settlement amount and amount needed to determine new proposed amount.
Example (settlement is R3800, amount needed is R2000, staying closest current term) means we offer from sliding scale
over terms closest to current either 4,5 or 6 months.
Once the option is chosen – then takes client to “apply New loan” with all their information filtered automatically from previous input. Asking them to check if information still the same like
or address, especially “financial information like income, expenses, bank details and
upload of latest payslip (the payslip upload is a must to load latest and should see latest update date please).
We can remove from “failure to settle
Perhaps replaced with “Kindly forward proof of payment to
Instead of M1, M2 etc, change to Jan, Feb, Mar etc.

Could the Remittance advice generate an Invoice which the employer can download if they need this. This would include all necessary information as an invoice to said employer / company with total due for specific period With Lenni bank details displayed on the letter.
I will send confirmation of bank details for you to populate for this letter and for any settlement letters as well please.
I have attached my e-signature which you may place on letters and documents where required
switch these 2 so that “Company Profile” is more visible and put “Reports” at the bottom
Google maps aren’t helping the HR to select address from populated feature. You could add
a “employee numbers only” as an upload feature of an excel doc (showing date of last upload) w
h is employee number list we could verify against
initial company check by adding an
then the total number on this list will populate
with we can measure against penetration % which can be visible on their reports feature and for
This verified employee number should also automatically be filtered to “apply for loan” screen under the employee number field.
Could we add the direct emails too please
Change “department head” to “Contact”, also allow to add more contacts under 1 division.
Also, you should be able to assign/link the contact to the division from the “key contacts” listed on previous screen.
Could we add a field/s for contacts with powers to sign/approve
(contact that checks information of employee/client and confirms
, Primary and Secondary signatories (make options to add signatories)
. This signatory appears on the actual loan application should the client/employee downloads it.
Could we give these key contacts the ability to sign digitally like that of the employee under “apply for loan”. And populates into the
of how the letter should look will be sent.
The whole Idea of this LMS is to try and be paperless and move away from traditional operations. I will have a Tablet on-hand when onboarding client and they can opt to sign there and then.
as an example for you to populate similar from our information received from the client/employee on “apply for loan”
Could you relook at both these search functions, I tried to put in “David” which is a name of a client in top search “search anything” but does not bring up David? And search employee
work and filter icon does not work.

“kickback % of pay over” (allow for input of percentage) or 2. “Commission amount” (allow for input of amount per month) which needs to be incorporated against the remittance advice amount due. Example if the company needs to pay us R10000 and their %kickback is 2%, then they only pay R9800 (the split should be shown at bottom of the remittance advice). If commission amount is R300, this needs to deducted from remittance due and shown. And 3. An option to apply “Discount” (an amount per application which we can remove from initiation fees). It’s a measure to beat competitors on pricing if the company insists on wanting to be cheaper. By
initiating this option it is only to be applied to said company.
What are these documents and audit logs section supposed to be or do or represent?
Counter offer cannot be outside my loan products / loan models (R400 – R8000) + (1 – 6 months). Remember the frequency must match the employee /
I also suggest to keep to the sliding scale (shows uniformity)
Once any of the above 3 decisions
are made, is a notification sent to the employee / client?
Also, I see some verified documents are missing on this applicant, I think we need to
have the latest payslip and employee signature on record. Doubt this applicant would have been able to proceed on the apply for loan screen.
This functionality would need to be done in the testing phase to see its correctly built.
Here I think we should have different stages as procedures need to be followed before an employee/client is written off to bad debt. See below
to client if no reason was received (sick, maternity, etc from HR) (sample letter below)
Export function to send to Collections Co.
Then if nothing received, this process starts
The system should automatically generate relevant individuals and place them in these groups so that relevant information could be sent to them.
Our records indicate that your loan account with Lenni is currently in arrears.
We kindly request that payment be made within {{
}} days from the date of this notice to bring your account up to date.
Payment can be made using the following details:
If you are experiencing financial difficulty or believe this notice was sent in error, please contact our collections department immediately at:
Please note that failure to make payment or contact us may result in further collection action in accordance with the National Credit Act.
SECTION 129 NOTICE IN TERMS OF THE NATIONAL CREDIT ACT 34 OF 2005
This letter serves as formal notice in terms of Section 129 of the National Credit Act 34 of 2005 (“the Act”) that your loan account with Lenni (Pty) Ltd is currently in default.
You are hereby advised that you may refer this matter to:
with the intent to resolve any dispute under the agreement or to develop and agree on a plan to bring your payments up to date.

Unless payment is made or suitable arrangements are entered into within 10 business days after delivery of this notice, Lenni (Pty) Ltd may proceed with legal enforcement of the credit agreement without further notice to you, subject to the provisions of the National Credit Act.
To discuss repayment arrangements, please contact:
I think all explained above in Finance user should also be applied or filtered to Recovery user.
Kindly update this document to all the columns you updated on HR user.
of columns needed, please populate as landscape
Also, don’t forget an Invoice document option with total due for certain period, thanks.
Change this heading to “Loans per Company”, then we can expand on this report to
Frequency divisions per company (count of monthly/fortnightly/weekly
2. This report can expand to count of certain loan amounts per company too.
We should also be able to see count of frequency as well as amounts for all companies too.
If all the test data you placed was other. Please make sure all the other Loan reasons will show in this report, count and percentage for all companies as well as per company.
